name: The home lab
log: Still on watch. Do not bury. He can hear you.
lastLog: "All lamps green. One tweak from perfect. Will fix tonight." - every log entry, verbatim, since 2021.
found: nothing missing. that's the whole point.

name: Piano
log: Light found cold. Bench tucked in. Metronome still ticking.
lastLog: "Got through the piece with both hands tonight. Good enough." - final entry, unsigned.
found: one shaky recording the family still requests
cause: got good enough, which was the goal

name: Music theory
log: Vanished the same night as the piano keeper. The two logs match exactly.
lastLog: "The circle of fifths is just modular arithmetic wearing a cape." - margin note, underlined twice.
found: annotated chord charts, still in a drawer

name: Game development
log: Kept one light, brightly, once. Extinguished it himself and signed the log.
lastLog: "Shipped. The cat is the boat. No further business." - last entry, signed with a flourish.
found: Meo Wave Race, complete and undefeated · see light list no. 008

name: Running
log: Missing since one summer. Kettle warm. Shoes by the door. Sea calm.
lastLog: "5k tomorrow, then every morning after." - only entry.
cause: no trace was ever found (the couch was not searched)
return: spring makes promises it won’t keep

name: Ham radio
eulogy: Last heard on 40 meters, then only static. The key still sits by the window.

name: Changing my OS
log: Never rests. Rebuilt the tower three times this year alone.
lastLog: "This is the last distro. I mean it this time." - entry, re-dated twice.
found: a dotfiles repo with more stars than the project it configures
return: it never left; that's the haunting
